top_comments.text: Yes I never understood why you buy something then go pay for a subscription to use the thing you already got. Like the pelton bike to get the good workouts you gotta get the subscription after paying 1,000 dollars.

We have it, my kids have been playing with it every day. It’s easy for kids to navigate and do it by themselves. It’s so much fun for the whole family. It helps them be active so they’re tired by bedtime.

Me and my kids love it, the games are great and fun af. Definitely worth the money and the $100 subscription isn’t the only option. New games are added to it constantly, lots of learning games as well as arcade games, plussss plenty of fitness apps as well. It’s not the same as a wii, vr or ps add on( your kids don’t have to have a controller or wand in there hand) , it’s games you don’t have to supervise aka you don’t have to worry about anything violent or not age appropriate. If you want something kid focused, low maintenance & fun for the whole family it’s a great investment.
